programmes.show_description: Celebrating pioneers and mavericks from Elvis to Aerosmith. Suzi presents her hand-picked list along with personal stories of the many legendary rock'n'rollers she's encountered!
Non-stop 70s rock & guitar action - all night!
From the era of glam rock, new wave and disco, it's all the hits from just one decade - the 1970s! Platform boots and flares at the ready?
We're bringing the spring sunshine to you - 70s style! Every vid is full of outdoor fun - with Elton & ELO, David Soul & David Cassidy, Bee Gees & Boney M!

programmes.show_name: Is This Really How They Started?!
programmes.show_description: Most went on to bigger things - but how did it all start in the 70s? Here are 30 chart and video debuts from household names - some songs are brilliant, but some you might not know.
